title: lasiopetalum glutinosum subsp. glutinosum
intro: Lasiopetalum glutinosum subsp. glutinosum, also known as the sticky gum plant or gum tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The sticky sap of the Lasiopetalum glutinosum subsp. glutinosum plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as sore throats, skin irritations, and wounds, due to its ability to promote healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, including infusions and ointments, can be made to harness its medicinal properties and provide health benefits, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
